raw_text: I had an issue with an order of Rollick kesar pista cone ice cream, wrapper of which was torn and the ice cream was coming out. I complained in the "chat with us" section with the photos uploaded. Blinkit assigned a support executive and wrote that it may take upto 5 minutes. But 30 mins passed no reply was there. Next day when I am verifying the status, it is showing that after 2mins they have replied for refund and being unattended they closed the chat without refund.

I am not able to understand that before travelling I had bought earbuds and one more item from Blinkit, I did not pay attention, the payment option did not come to me, I changed the Blinkit add money by Rs. 990, after that Blinkit is troubling me so much, despite being such a big company, who cannot realise this, I even lost Rs. 1000, whenever I order in my heart, the service I get has been absolutely third class, my app was fully tested, I will tell you what to do, yes guys, you guys, never 😡

app is very good but the only thing i am experiencing and is not good is that they should stop taking orders for late night....and if the order is once placed..they should deliver it.I ordered at 12 30 and the portal was accepting the order...so we ordered...but the thing is that it was not being assigned to the delivery boy and later it showed that the store is offline due to high demand.I mean that they should deliver the order in these casess....PLEASE FIX THIS ISSUE

the app was showing payment failed and due to this took payment 2 times and delivered same items 2 times and when I went to need help option to cancel 2nd order, it showed something went wrong. app was also not showing status of orders
I ordered Palmonas braslet but it was replaced with some other named. Most of the times items ordered are in good condition. sometimes if it shown two items only one is delivered.

Very good app with super fast delivery and a smooth, responsive interface. My only complaint is the ₹5 handling charge, especially when it's added on top of delivery charges. A better option would be to waive handling charges on orders above ₹150, just like delivery charges are waived above ₹149. 😂 Apart from that, the service is excellent and the overall experience is great. Keep it up!

the product is not getting properly I ordered 2,4 times product is not working like I ordered cable cable is good but not working then I asked the app for replacement then blinkit says to catch warranty my product is already in replacement 7 days but he says to catch me warranty

The service has become pathetic. Twice they delivered damaged unhygienic food items. we have photos and videos of the same. We shared it on their help page and email ID. they simply say that they don't find anything wrong with the items. In one order, we ordered guava, chunks were missing, possibility of being eaten by rodents! In another one we received open packet of chicken! As customers, save yourselves from such companies and buy from local vendors! Atleast they acknowledge accountability.
This app is good enough, but not that good. We have ordered many things from different apps, and they always arrive at the exact location, but Blinkit never comes to the exact location.

The product delivered was not as described. The customer service has been unresponsive to inquiries, offering only apologies without resolution. It is imperative that action be taken against your service provider for this breach of contract. The disparity between the product discussed and the product delivered is unacceptable. My primary concern is this discrepancy. Please rectify this situation. I will refrain from future orders via the Blink app.

I raised a quality-related issue and shared live-captured images as evidence. Although the support team initially assured me of a full refund, only half the amount was refunded after I escalated the matter on Twitter a week later. It is unclear why additional image proof was requested when the required live images had already been submitted.

Hello Team, I ordered rice from Blinkit, but the product delivered was not of the expected quality and was not as described. I raised a complaint immediately, however, no action has been taken so far. I request you to kindly look into the matter and provide a resolution at the earliest, either through a replacement or refund. Please update me on the status of my complaint. no mail, no contact number, store manager not able to give any help, worst service in any problem

Worst experience with Blinkit surge pricing. It feels less like “high demand” and more like a permanent pricing tactic. In my area, surge was active continuously from 10 AM to 8 PM. Instead of making me order faster, it pushed me to a competitor. I checked Zepto and ordered at a lower price. Even ₹1 extra matters because customers question fairness, not just cost. Convenience apps should reduce friction, not add it. Permanent surge pricing risks losing trust, loyalty, and sales.
It Is not good for ordering stationery as, l order two books that had a very good front cover, but when it came the front cover was not same and was totally different and not even as expected.

I liked this app very much because other online delivery apps used to take a lot of time like 1 or 3 days, but in this one it took only 3 minutes for my parcel to arrive.And another big reason for this is that their showroom is just a few meters away from my house 😁😁.

bad experience with location, when I order to a particular place using pin 📍 and complete address it's going to other place. it happened twice one i cancelled, other time delivery boy came when I send live location in WhatsApp. I've tried to update address again, if it won't work next time when I place the order, then blinkit is not for me, there are many competitors out there. if there is an issue please address it. Just being descriptive that you will be aware of such edge cases in case.

my experience with blinkit service is very bad it has the worst service ever . I've ordered cells for my landline phone and i received the wrong product. I've tried to return since the day I ordered I've raised chats but there was very poor response no one is replying there's no response they have been delaying the pick up saying the store is currently unavailable today was the 7th day I've got very angry and contacted sp today was the pick up but I'm not getting my refund.blinkit is worst .

Delivery person never called or delivered and app showed delivered. I suggest you make it so that the client has to press a button saying yes I received it and without that delivery person should not be allowed to say he has delivered. these are all paid packages with extra charges for handling n delivery. very disappointed
Never trust this app. It's just so frustrating. First thing is that they deliver destroyed product saying that you can replace it within 7 days. And then they denied it. Literally denied it.

REALLY!!!! i am not satisfied with this service of app cause, for just a few things they add delivery charge. and what this means of high surge demand!!!! you are forcing the customer to pay 499!!!!! and if someone can't pay online there is no cash on delivery option available why? sucks on this app!!! i am unable to see your response!!!
